panels.caption: 2 AM. The machine never sleeps.
panels.prompt: Soviet constructivist poster art style. Extreme geometric shapes, bold diagonal compositions. Strictly limited palette: black, white, and pure red only. The figure at the computer rendered as heroic geometric forms — triangles, circles, strong diagonals. The screen is a red geometric shape radiating power. Rodchenko or El Lissitzky aesthetic. Bold, graphic, almost typographic in its clarity. No text, no speech bubbles.

panels.caption: Something's wrong.
panels.prompt: Soviet constructivist style. Black, white, red. Close-up rendered as bold geometric abstraction — a face reduced to strong shapes, a fist raised, a diagonal of concern. The error on screen is a stark red diagonal slash across a white circle. Geometric, powerful, propagandistic energy applied to debugging. Strong shadows, sharp angles. No text.

panels.caption: The logs don't lie. The logic does.
panels.prompt: Constructivist poster panel. The problem visualized as geometric chaos — broken circles, crossed diagonals in red. The figure is a strong dark silhouette against white, leaning toward the problem with geometric purpose. Bold shapes, no gradients, pure black/white/red. The energy of a propaganda poster about INDUSTRIALISM applied to software debugging. No text.

panels.caption: There.
panels.prompt: Soviet constructivist close-up. A single geometric form isolated — the bug is a small red circle surrounded by white space and black geometric order. A geometric hand shape pointing to it. The eureka moment rendered as pure graphic clarity: one shape identified among many. Black white red. Bold, clean, powerful. No text.

panels.caption: Fix it. Ship it. Move on.
panels.prompt: Constructivist poster art. The fix — a powerful diagonal composition, the figure a bold geometric shape in motion, red arrows pointing forward and upward. The energy of forward progress, production, the machine working as it should. Strong diagonal from lower-left to upper-right. Black, white, red. Heroic. No text.

panels.caption: 3:17 AM. Tests pass. The city doesn't know. Doesn't need to.
panels.prompt: Soviet constructivist wide panel. Geometric triumph — a large red circle (the sun, completion, success) in the corner, strong geometric rays. The figure a bold dark silhouette against white. The city window rendered as a grid of white rectangles on black. Clean, powerful, certain. The resolution panel of a constructivist visual essay. Black white red. No text.
